Button Group

Group related buttons into a single visual unit.

Basic
Default
HTML
<lyte-button-group>
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
    <lyte-button lt-prop-appearance="primary">...</lyte-button>
    <lyte-button lt-prop-appearance="primary">...</lyte-button>
    <lyte-button lt-prop-appearance="primary">...</lyte-button>
  </template>
</lyte-button-group>
